title: M22-4, Part II, Chapter 3, Section J – Benefits Manager Specialized Claim Adjudication
description: This part discusses how non-chapter 33 education benefits, Montgomery GI Bill (MGIB or chapter 30), Montgomery GI Bill - Selected Reserve (chapter 1606) and Dependents Educational Assistance (DEA or Ch35) awards are processed in Benefits Manager (BM).
keywords: DGIB, Managed Service, BM, Benefits Manager, BDN
